hero.subtitle: Send, receive and manage your money with security. Designed for a fast and simple mobile experience.
banner.title: Learn to use your wallet with confidence
banner.subtitle: Security tips, app usage and best practices to protect your account.
features.title: Everything in one wallet
features.subtitle: Tools for everyday life, built for a mobile-first experience.
features.item1.title: Multi-currency
features.item1.body: Manage balances and move money easily.
features.item2.title: Transfers
features.item2.body: Send and receive using email, phone or QR with traceability.
features.item3.title: QR payments
features.item3.body: Pay and get paid without cash, fast and simple.
security.title: Security first
security.subtitle: Controls designed to reduce fraud and protect access.
security.bullet1: OTP by SMS and Email with expiration and resend limits.
security.bullet3: Admin panel with audit, allowlist and integrations.
